name: @hasna/access
description: Non-human-identity governance: CLI + MCP + serve over a Hasna-contract store. Identity inventory, credential & MCP-scope mapping, JIT elevation, access reviews, one-click revocation, and the cohort MCP bearer-token issuer.

scripts.build: bun build src/cli/index.tsx --outdir dist/cli --target bun --external ink --external react --external chalk --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk --external hono --external pg && bun build src/mcp/index.ts --outdir dist/mcp --target bun --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk --external pg && bun build src/server/index.ts --outdir dist/server --target bun --external hono --external pg && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun --external pg && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist
scripts.verify: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build && bun run conformance
scripts.openapi:generate: bun run src/cli/index.tsx openapi generate --out openapi.json
scripts.openapi:check: bun run src/cli/index.tsx openapi check --path openapi.json

author: Andrei Hasna <andrei@hasna.com>
